timeline.sentence: The man never imagined the safest room in the bank was actually the trap.
timeline.visual_summary: The protagonist steps into the vault and the door locks behind him.
timeline.match_reason: The narration describes a trap, and the selected scene visually shows the vault door locking.

timeline.sentence: Only then did he realize the robbery had started before he entered the building.
timeline.visual_summary: A flashback shows the guard secretly switching the keycard.
timeline.match_reason: The flashback explains how the trap was prepared before the vault scene.
